audit_items.proof_trace: The lookahead correctly covers MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1 epochs after epoch processing. ProcessProposerLookahead slides the window and computes proposers for epoch N+MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1, resulting in coverage [N+1..N+MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1], which matches the expected range for the next MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1 epochs.
